actions.text: Amendment SA 5591 ruled out of order by the chair.
Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5501, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 51 - 47. Record Vote Number: 145.
Point of order that the amendment violates section 313(b)(1)(c) of the CBA raised in Senate with respect to amendment SA 5501.
Amendment SA 5501 proposed by Senator Hickenlooper.

Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Motion to waive all budgetary discipline with respect to amendment SA 5501, not having achieved 60 votes in the affirmative, rejected in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 51 - 47. Record Vote Number: 145.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5501 proposed by Senator Hickenlooper.

purpose: To prohibit the distribution of Federal funds to individuals convicted of certain crimes.
